name: design-partner-radar
proxy: Company is a strong design-partner candidate for AI control/reliability infrastructure

source.query: Find B2B software, developer tooling, AI infrastructure, data infrastructure, security, and platform engineering companies that are actively building or shipping AI agents, code agents, internal copilots, or LLM workflow automation. Prioritize evidence from docs, changelogs, engineering blogs, product launch pages, job posts, and public repos from the last 120 days. Exclude agencies, consultancies, consumer-only apps, and generic AI marketing pages.

criteria.description: The company sells software or infrastructure to businesses
There is concrete public evidence of current agentic or LLM-workflow work
The evidence is technical or operational, not just branding
The evidence is recent enough to matter now
The company is large or operationally complex enough that control/reliability pain is plausible

enrichments.description: one-sentence summary of the AI/agent initiative
approximate employee count or scale signal, if found

source.query: Find B2B software, developer tooling, AI infrastructure, security, data infrastructure, and platform engineering companies with public evidence of AI reliability, evaluation, observability, auditability, approval flow, rollback, governance, or compliance pain. Prefer incident writeups, engineering posts, docs about evals or approvals, changelogs, platform docs, and job posts for AI platform, evals, safety, or observability. Exclude generic policy pages unless they clearly connect to a real operating workflow.

criteria.description: There is a specific operational problem or control surface visible in public evidence
The evidence is tied to AI systems, agents, copilots, or LLM workflows
The pain is operationally meaningful, not vague trust messaging
There is a plausible internal owner of the problem

source.query: Find recent trigger events at B2B software, developer tooling, AI infrastructure, security, data infrastructure, and platform engineering companies that suggest a near-term opening for AI control, observability, or orchestration infrastructure. Look for new Head of AI, Platform, Developer Productivity, or Security hires; launches of agents or copilots; funding; enterprise or compliance announcements; migration guides; evaluation platform rollouts; or major product expansions in the last 45 days.

criteria.description: The event plausibly creates urgency, budget, or organizational attention
The event could lead to tooling evaluation or workflow redesign

enrichments.description: one-sentence explanation of why it may matter now

conditions.enrichment: one-sentence summary of the AI/agent initiative
one-sentence explanation of why it may matter now

signal.proxy: Company shows convergent signals of agentic buildout, control pain, or timely trigger events — strong design-partner candidate

_usage.description: Design-partner radar: surfaces B2B companies with active agent buildout, visible control pain, or timely trigger events that make them strong candidates for design partnership, advisory, or pilot conversations.

websetLensMap._comment: Set these to actual webset IDs after creation
